# Jetpack Nano

> Jetpack Nano is a real-time social content aggregator that pulls fresh, on-topic posts from the open social web (Mastodon) and YouTube. Users select topic interests and receive a live, continuously-refreshing feed of videos, images, stories, and text posts — no need to visit each social platform separately.

## What it does
- Aggregates real-time content from Mastodon (open social web) and YouTube per user-selected topics
- Displays videos, images, text posts, and multi-image stories in a unified, mobile-first feed
- Supports custom topic input (any topic, not just predefined categories)
- Drag-and-drop topic prioritization
- Comments, likes, and sharing with deeplinks
- Cookie-based persistence (no account required)
- Background refresh keeps content fresh

## Technology
- Frontend: React + Vite (TypeScript), deployed on Vercel
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Storage, Auth)
- Live content API: serverless function fetching Mastodon + YouTube (via Piped)
- Open source: https://github.com/seanmeverett/jetpacknano

## Key URLs
- Main app: https://www.jetpacknano.com
- Live content API: https://www.jetpacknano.com/api/feed?topics=music,science,tech
- GitHub: https://github.com/seanmeverett/jetpacknano
